{{Infobox character
| name = Rebekkah
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|doll}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[graveyard]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

''See also: [[Rebekkah Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Rebekkah is a character who possesses long red hair styled in a single braid. She typically wears simple, brown clothing consisting of a shirt and pants secured by a rope belt, an outfit reminiscent of the attire worn by impoverished villagers or [[Simon]]'s former clothing. She appears to communicate with others, often offering commentary on combat and social situations. Her personality is characterized by a penchant for conflict, as she frequently encourages fighting or suggests aggressive tactics to obtain information. She shows an interest in the figure [[Alin]] through stories told by [[Simon]] and expresses opinions regarding [[Azura]]'s preferences for combative individuals. Throughout various situations, she provides warnings and vocal support during active events.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Rebekkah is a doll who maintains communication with [[Simon]], having previously spoken with [[Gloria]] about his journey into [[Endross]]. During their interactions, she laughed and urged [[Simon]] to reclaim his killer instinct. She eventually began communicating with him through mental links while positioned in the graveyard. Following an incident where her left arm was half torn off at the shoulder, her limb was eventually bound in a sling.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rebekkah]] has communicated with [[Gloria]] regarding [[Simon]]'s foray into [[Endross]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rebekkah]] is a doll that [[Simon]] communicates with.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rebekkah]] started to laugh.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rebekkah]] communicates with [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rebekkah]] told [[Simon]] to get his killer instinct back.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rebekkah]] communicates with [[Simon]] mentally.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rebekkah]] is a character who is currently in the graveyard.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rebekkah]]'s left arm was half torn off at the shoulder.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rebekkah]]'s arm was bound in a sling.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
